commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `tools.fs.roots` config and threads root-scoped host filesystem and media access through agent tools, `apply_patch`, local media, outbound channel delivery, generated baselines, and the plugin SDK media runtime.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: call `resolveAgentScopedOutboundMediaAccess` with `tools.fs.roots: []` and an `agentId` or explicit `workspaceDir`; the code appends the workspace to an empty root set at `src/media/read-capability.ts:203`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the code defect is narrow, but contributor proof and maintainer product/API approval are still required and cannot be supplied by repair automation.
